description:
Calculate the solar energy fraction for the household using the 'house_kwh' (consumption) and 'solar_kwh' (generation) feeds in Emoncms. Determine the total energy for each feed over the entire available data history (Last Value - First Value) to calculate the Solar Fraction percentage: (Total Solar / Total House) * 100. Save a report to /home/ga/solar_fraction_report.txt with the following format, rounding all values to 2 decimal places:

Total House Consumption (kWh): <value>
Total Solar Generation (kWh): <value>
Solar Fraction (%): <value>
